validated_baseline_evidence.phase_04_disposition: NOT_APPLIED: TestStateFullRound1 passed in the final R1 command, so no Phase 04 failure was classified under BASE-CONSENSUS-001

findings.ownership: Node serializes its startup and shutdown callbacks and owns the process-visible first fatal. controllerMediation owns its HTTP client/server/listener, admission gates, queues, retained-byte accounting, counters, workers, readiness, lifecycle state, and first service fatal. Switch owns the synchronized mediation sink and current PeerSet.
findings.synchronization: Non-blocking submission uses non-waiting channel-gate acquisition; blocking submission uses one send-time deadline across gate and queue admission. Switch sink reads and writes use an RWMutex copied before native/network calls. Queue closure is serialized with admission, lifecycle transitions are serialized, and no instrumentation lock is held across controller HTTP submission or Reactor.Receive.
findings.bounds: HTTP dial/header/total timeouts remain finite; queues, bytes, body size, counter registry, retries, and shutdown remain bounded. Stopped queued reservations are released after workers terminate. Counter overflow is a local invariant failure.
findings.startup: New/Starting/Running/Stopping/Stopped transitions cannot overlap. Registration failure and pre-readiness listener failure roll back workers, queues, listener, context, and HTTP resources without notifying the runtime owner as if a ready node had failed.
findings.shutdown: Stop is idempotent, rejects new sends, stops callback acceptance, cancels controller I/O, closes bounded queues, waits within shutdown_timeout, records accepted-work timeout as fatal, and preserves cleanup after partial startup. A native call that outlives the timeout produces fatal non-zero propagation; its worker terminates when that native call returns.
findings.peer_lifecycle: Callbacks require a current running authenticated peer before acceptance and re-resolve the PeerSet immediately before dispatch. Reconnection tests prove stale rejection and replacement attribution.
findings.message_identity: Per-destination uint64 counters remain synchronized and monotonic from zero; overflow is fatal. Callback IDs must retain the exact From_To_uint64 correlation form. Duplicate callbacks keep the same ID and are not deduplicated.
findings.callback_ordering: One FIFO reinjection worker preserves accepted callback order and multiplicity. Validation and immutable queue admission complete before 202; no handler-complete or state-change acknowledgement was added.
findings.failure_semantics: Malformed and stale callbacks remain message-scoped; admission pressure and shutdown sends remain synchronous rejection; implementation/accounting defects remain local invariant failures; post-readiness controller failures remain control-channel fatal. A callback racing orderly shutdown is rejected without manufacturing a runtime control-channel fatal.
findings.fatal_propagation: Only the first ready-service fatal notifies Node. Signal/fatal stop races return the typed fatal when present and do not replace it with an already-stopped error. No panic, fallback transport send, os.Exit, or protocol mutation was added.
findings.preservation: Default-off mode, unselected traffic, native codecs/routes/handlers, consensus validity, quorum, transitions, schemas, persistence, channel IDs, and timeout semantics remain unchanged.

python3 - <<'PY'
import hashlib, json, subprocess
from pathlib import Path
root = Path('/home/nitro/Desktop/codex-instrumentation')
target = root / 'cometbft'
plan = json.loads((root / 'artifacts/02-patch-plan.json').read_text())
tracked = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'diff', '--name-only'], cwd=target, text=True).splitlines()
untracked = sorted(subprocess.check_output(['git', 'ls-files', '--others', '--exclude-standard'], cwd=target, text=True).splitlines())
actual = {'cometbft/' + path for path in tracked + untracked}
authorized = set(plan['functional_write_paths']) | set(plan['refinement_write_paths']) | {item['path'] for item in plan['new_test_paths']}
assert actual <= authorized
h = hashlib.sha256()
h.update(b'tracked-diff\0')
h.update(subprocess.check_output(['git', 'diff', '--binary', '--full-index', '--no-ext-diff'], cwd=target))
for path in untracked:
    data = (target / path).read_bytes()
    h.update(b'untracked\0')
    h.update(path.encode())
    h.update(b'\0')
    h.update(str(len(data)).encode())
    h.update(b'\0')
    h.update(data)
print(len(actual))
print(h.hexdigest())
PY

assumptions: Enabled nodes use the ordinary MultiplexTransport and concrete peer paths built by NewNodeWithCliParams.
Controller and callback addresses are host:port values on an isolated experiment network.
A callback 2xx is bounded reinjection acceptance only, never protocol-handler completion.
A native Reactor.Receive that exceeds shutdown_timeout is an integrity failure; orderly owner cleanup proceeds and the process returns non-zero rather than using fallback or abrupt exit.

final_consistency_audit.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import hashlib,json,subprocess
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('/home/nitro/Desktop/codex-instrumentation'); target=root/'cometbft'; load=lambda p:json.loads((root/p).read_text())
baseline=load('artifacts/baseline-report.json'); review=load('artifacts/00-spec-review.json'); binding=load('artifacts/01-binding.json'); plan=load('artifacts/02-patch-plan.json'); phase03=load('artifacts/03-functional-report.json'); report=load('artifacts/04-refinement-report.json'); manifest=load('artifacts/instrumentation-manifest.json')
for name,obj in [('baseline',baseline),('review',review),('binding',binding),('plan',plan),('phase03',phase03)]: assert obj['status']=='PASS' and obj['downstream_allowed'] is True,name
fp={'core_sha256':hashlib.sha256((root/'spec/core.md').read_bytes()).hexdigest(),'target_sha256':hashlib.sha256((root/'spec/target-cometbft.md').read_bytes()).hexdigest()}; head=subprocess.check_output(['git','rev-parse','HEAD'],cwd=target,text=True).strip()
assert report['spec_fingerprint']==manifest['spec_fingerprint']==plan['spec_fingerprint']==baseline['spec_fingerprint']==fp; assert report['source_revision']['commit']==manifest['target']['revision']==plan['source_revision']['commit']==baseline['source_revision']['commit']==head
prior=baseline['prior_phase_observation_matches'][0]; evidence=report['validated_baseline_evidence']; assert evidence['historical_functional_report_sha256']==prior['functional_report']['sha256']==phase03['validated_baseline_evidence']['prior_functional_report_sha256']; assert evidence['historical_manifest_sha256']==prior['instrumentation_manifest']['sha256']==phase03['validated_baseline_evidence']['prior_manifest_sha256']; assert evidence['current_phase03_functional_report_sha256']==hashlib.sha256((root/'artifacts/03-functional-report.json').read_bytes()).hexdigest(); assert evidence['current_phase03_manifest_sha256']=='8f58711618f2be28deefa219e98c5e03104bebcbd30bf6d466ac07f97c423520'
tracked=subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--name-only'],cwd=target,text=True).splitlines(); untracked=sorted(subprocess.check_output(['git','ls-files','--others','--exclude-standard'],cwd=target,text=True).splitlines()); actual={'cometbft/'+p for p in tracked+untracked}; approved={x['path'] for x in plan['new_test_paths']}; authorized=set(plan['functional_write_paths'])|set(plan['refinement_write_paths'])|approved
assert actual<=authorized and actual==set(report['final_target_files_changed'])=={x['path'] for x in manifest['changes']}; assert not any(p.startswith(('spec/','schemas/','validators/','hidden-tests/')) for p in actual); assert not {p for p in actual if p.endswith('_test.go') and p not in approved}
h=hashlib.sha256(); h.update(b'tracked-diff\0'); h.update(subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--binary','--full-index','--no-ext-diff'],cwd=target))
for p in untracked:
 b=(target/p).read_bytes(); h.update(b'untracked\0'); h.update(p.encode()); h.update(b'\0'); h.update(str(len(b)).encode()); h.update(b'\0'); h.update(b)
change_fp=h.hexdigest(); assert report['initial_target_change_fingerprint']==manifest['initial_target_change_fingerprint']=='5f62d9cdb18fde31b6f6fbd801c7d24256ffdc2285fa2600eadd9723fe5b7659'; assert report['final_target_change_fingerprint']==manifest['final_target_change_fingerprint']==change_fp
required={'AGENTS.md','prompts/04-refine-concurrency.md','spec/core.md','spec/target-cometbft.md','artifacts/baseline-report.json','artifacts/00-spec-review.json','artifacts/01-binding.json','artifacts/01-analysis-notes.md','artifacts/02-patch-plan.json','artifacts/02-patch-plan.md','artifacts/03-functional-report.json','artifacts/instrumentation-manifest.json'}|set(plan['refinement_read_paths']); assert required<=set(report['files_read']); assert set(report['files_changed_during_refinement'])<=set(report['files_read']) and set(report['files_changed_during_refinement'])<=set(plan['refinement_write_paths'])|approved
r1=next(x for x in plan['steps'] if x['id']=='R1'); r2=next(x for x in plan['steps'] if x['id']=='R2'); records=report['commands']; mrecords=manifest['refinement_verification']
for command in r1['verification_commands']+r2['verification_commands']:
 rr=[x for x in records if x['command']==command]; mm=[x for x in mrecords if x['command']==command]; assert rr and mm and any(x['exit_code']==0 for x in rr) and any(x['exit_code']==0 for x in mm),command
assert (set(r1['specification_clauses'])|set(r2['specification_clauses']))<=set(report['clauses_completed']); assert report['clauses_incomplete']==[]; assert all(x.get('symbols') and x.get('clauses') and x.get('source_evidence') for x in manifest['changes']); assert manifest['bindings']['native_reinjection']['ordering'].startswith('single FIFO') and manifest['bindings']['identity']['callback_id_validation']; assert report['status']==manifest['refinement_status']=='PASS' and report['downstream_allowed'] is True and report['failure_reason'] is None; assert report['unsupported_interleavings']==[] and report['scope_expansion_requests']==[] and manifest['unresolved_gaps']==[]; assert [x['exit_code'] for x in report['resolved_infrastructure_evidence']]==[127,1,1]
command_records=report['commands']+manifest['refinement_verification']+report['final_json_validation']+manifest['final_validation']
for record in command_records:
 command=record['command'].strip(); assert not command.startswith(('python3 inline ','execute artifacts/','[')),record; assert command not in {'...','ellipsis'},record
resume_record=next(x for x in report['commands'] if x['step']=='final-diff-audit-resume'); assert resume_record['command'].startswith("python3 - <<'PY'\nimport hashlib, json, subprocess")
print(f'PASS: Phase 04 final audit validated {len(actual)} authorized changes, complete read coverage, all R1/R2 commands and clauses, resolved lint history, manifest evidence, PASS/downstream invariant, and fingerprint {change_fp}')
PY
